Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: A tenant in the shopping complex.

id.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the tenant's user account, linking their login to their tenant record.

phone.description: The phone number of the tenant.

propertyId.description: The ID of the property the tenant is renting.

paymentDay.description: The day of the month rent is due.

leaseStartDate.description: The start date of the lease.

lastPaidDate.description: The last date a payment was recorded for this tenant.

isArchived.description: Whether the tenant's lease has ended. Archived tenants are hidden from active lists.

Property.title: Property
Property.description: A shop in the shopping complex.

id.description: The unique identifier for the property.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: A record of a single payment made by a tenant.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment.

tenantId.description: The ID of the tenant who made the payment.

propertyId.description: The ID of the property for which the payment was made.

paymentDate.description: The date the payment was recorded for.

recordedAt.description: The timestamp when the payment was recorded in the system.

PaymentProof.title: Payment Proof
PaymentProof.description: A record of a tenant's submitted payment amount in words.

amountInWords.description: The amount paid, submitted in words by the tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/payment_proofs/{proo.description: Collection of payment proofs submitted by a tenant.

/payments/{paymentId}.description: Collection of all payments for easy querying across all tenants.
